goal: Split auth.py into token, session, and middleware modules with a shared types module
context: Python auth module with token verification, session management, and middleware all in one file. Extract into separate modules: shared types first (A), then token and session in parallel (B, C), then middleware that depends on both (D).

tasks.title: Create shared auth types
tasks.goal: Create src/auth_types.py with shared type definitions (Claims, Session) used by token, session, and middleware modules.
acceptance: src/auth_types.py exists with Claims and Session types

tasks.title: Extract token module
tasks.goal: Move verify_token from auth.py to src/token.py, importing Claims from auth_types.

tasks.title: Extract session module
tasks.goal: Move create_session from auth.py to src/session.py, importing Session from auth_types.

tasks.title: Extract middleware module
tasks.goal: Move auth_middleware from auth.py to src/middleware.py, importing from both token and session modules.
acceptance: auth.py is now a thin re-export facade
